scope.routing_contract: ordered selected neuron IDs and their corresponding contiguous FP32 row blocks are immutable witness inputs; WTA/LSH search and reranking are outside this bounded component benchmark
scope.measured_operation: host materialization of a supplied selected block, input packing, tensor bind, transfer-inclusive submit/wait, synchronization, copied output, and selected-row dot plus SiLU
scope.cpu_reference_policy: a scalar FP32 implementation is used only as the numerical oracle; the vectorized NumPy selected-row implementation is the only CPU latency baseline

fixed_geometry.prefix_rule: k64 and k128 consume exact ordered prefixes of the same k256 selected-row and selected-ID witness; no rerouting or alternate support is permitted

cells.latency_implementation: optimized vectorized NumPy einsum plus stable vectorized SiLU
cells.numeric_oracle: scalar FP32 ordered dot plus branch-stable SiLU

cells.compile_shape: fixed batch 16 and fixed variant/layer dimensions
cells.silent_fallback: forbidden; AUTO, CPU, GPU, multi-device, ambiguous multiple-NPU enumeration, a same-family substitute, and omitted execution-device receipts fail closed

cells.required_backend: one explicitly enumerated OpenVINO Intel integrated GPU device
cells.compile_shape: fixed batch 16 and fixed variant/layer dimensions
cells.silent_fallback: forbidden; missing or ambiguous integrated-device identity, AUTO, CPU, NPU, discrete GPU, multi-device execution, and a different same-family GPU all fail closed

timing.clock: Windows QueryPerformanceCounter raw ticks plus one QueryPerformanceFrequency receipt
timing.percentile: nearest-rank p50 and p95 without interpolation
timing.sample: one batch-16 bundle containing exactly three dependent-shape layer calls; inputs are supplied independently so this component benchmark does not claim CountSketch or model end-to-end timing
timing.accelerator_transfer_accounting: OpenVINO does not expose a portable host QPC boundary for DMA. H2D, device compute, and device-side D2H visibility are therefore inseparable inside submit plus wait; the end-to-end total includes them and exact logical FP32 bytes are reported. No kernel-only timing is an adoption input.
timing.compile_and_first_call: reported separately and excluded from steady percentiles
timing.raw_timing_receipt: one fresh JSONL row per backend, variant, and timed sample, retaining every raw stage interval

physical_call_receipts.artifact: fresh JSONL separate from the summary

component_performance_gate.interpretation: passing authorizes only a later integrated benchmark; it does not establish sparse-model quality, HashStem value, teacher ranking quality, or game strength

rules: CPU is never substituted for a requested accelerator
OpenVINO AUTO, HETERO and MULTI are forbidden
NPU absence or compile failure produces an unavailable receipt
without --npu-device, more than one enumerated NPU-family device is ambiguous and fails closed
the iGPU cell runs only on an explicitly identified Intel integrated GPU; absence, ambiguity, or unverifiable integration produces an unavailable receipt
the compiled EXECUTION_DEVICES entry must be the exact selected enumerated device string, not merely the same NPU/GPU family
results from an available cell may remain in the artifact but cannot erase another cell's fail-closed status
